Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionBranchCondition

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionBranchCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchCondition
public interface IExecutionBranchCondition extends IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a branch condition, e.g. x < 0.

The default implementation is ExecutionBranchCondition which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

See Also:
  • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
  • ExecutionBranchCondition

  • Method Details

    • getAdditionalBranchLabel

      String getAdditionalBranchLabel()
      Returns the optional additional branch label.
      Returns:
      The additional branch label if available or null if not available.

    • isBranchConditionComputed

      boolean isBranchConditionComputed()
      Checks if the value of getBranchCondition() is already computed.
      Returns:
      true value of getBranchCondition() is already computed, false value of getBranchCondition() needs to be computed.

    • getBranchCondition

      Term getBranchCondition() throws ProofInputException

      Returns the branch condition as Term.

      If this branch conditions merged proof nodes this Term is the overall branch condition.

      Returns:
      The branch condition as Term.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • getFormatedBranchCondition

      String getFormatedBranchCondition() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the human readable branch condition as string.
      Returns:
      The human readable branch condition.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException

    • isMergedBranchCondition

      boolean isMergedBranchCondition()
      Checks if this branch condition is a merged one.
      Returns:
      true is merged branch condition, false is normal branch condition.

    • getMergedProofNodes

      Node[] getMergedProofNodes()

      Returns the branch condition nodes in KeY's proof tree which are merged into this IExecutionBranchCondition.

      It includes also IExecutionElement.getProofNode().

      Returns:
      The merged proof nodes.

    • getMergedBranchCondtions

      Term[] getMergedBranchCondtions() throws ProofInputException
      Returns the branch condition Terms.
      Returns:
      The branch condition Terms.
      Throws:
      ProofInputException
